report.summary: Audited 2 new learn guides (RaaS, Staking-as-a-Service) and funding rate tracker for UX issues; fixed duplicate-word typo, added table accessibility attributes (aria-label, scope), added nav aria-label for ToC; created 3 missing OG images (RaaS guide 1200x630, Staking providers 1200x630, Funding Rate Tracker 1200x630); fixed broken OG image reference (.png to .svg) on funding rate tracker page.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed 'Governance Governance Challenges' duplicate-word typo in RaaS guide risks section
Added aria-label='Table of contents' to RaaS guide nav element for screen reader accessibility
Added aria-label and scope='col' attributes to both comparison tables in RaaS guide (tech stack table, providers comparison table)
Fixed broken OG image reference on funding rate tracker page (og-funding-rate-tracker.png to .svg — PNG file never existed)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: raas-rollup-as-a-service-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — modular layer diagram, provider pills (Conduit/Caldera/Gelato/AltLayer), key stats ($354M market, 100+ rollups, 20.5% CAGR)
OG image: staking-service-providers-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — market share bar chart (Lido 24.2%, Coinbase 5.1%, Figment 4.5%), AUM metrics ($5.8B to $33.3B), provider comparison layout
OG image: funding-rate-tracker (1200x630 SVG) — mock funding rate table (BTC/ETH/SOL/DOGE with green/red rates), exchange badges (Binance/Bybit/OKX/Bitget/dYdX/Hyperliquid), feature pills

sections.title: UX Audit Notes (No Action Needed)
items: Both new learn guides follow established degen0x design patterns: glass cards, dark theme, breadcrumbs, structured data, BackToTop component
Table horizontal scroll pattern correctly applied for mobile (overflowX: auto with minWidth)
FAQ sections render well as glass cards with proper spacing
Color-coded info cards in RaaS guide use consistent border-color opacity pattern
Both pages include proper data hierarchy: badge, title, description, reading time
Staking guide uses SITE_URL constant correctly; RaaS guide hardcodes URL (minor inconsistency, not blocking)
